'''hashoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:poculum|poculum]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-sh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:poculum|poculum]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hashoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæsheseth|hæsheseth]] || [[word:hæshesej|hæshesej]] || [[word:hæshesesh|hæshesesh]] || [[word:hæshese|hæshese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hashoshosoth|hashoshosoth]] || [[word:hashoshosoj|hashoshosoj]] || [[word:hashoshososh|hashoshososh]] || [[word:hashoshoso|hashoshoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hashosoth|hashosoth]] || [[word:hashosoj|hashosoj]] || [[word:hashososh|hashososh]] || [[word:hashoso|hashoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hashofsoth|hashofsoth]] || [[word:hashofsoj|hashofsoj]] || [[word:hashofsosh|hashofsosh]] || [[word:hashofsof|hashofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hashosotho|hashosotho]] || [[word:hashosojo|hashosojo]] || [[word:hashososho|hashososho]] || [[word:hashosoko|hashosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hashosoth|hashosoth]] || [[word:hashosoj|hashosoj]] || [[word:hashososh|hashososh]] || [[word:hashoso|hashoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hashosothol|hashosothol]] || [[word:hashosojol|hashosojol]] || [[word:hashososhol|hashososhol]] || [[word:hashosokol|hashosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hashosothotho|hashosothotho]] || [[word:hashosojojo|hashosojojo]] || [[word:hashososhosho|hashososhosho]] || [[word:hashosoko|hashosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hashosothon|hashosothon]] || [[word:hashosojon|hashosojon]] || [[word:hashososhon|hashososhon]] || [[word:hashosokon|hashosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hashosothoro|hashosothoro]] || [[word:hashosojoro|hashosojoro]] || [[word:hashososhoro|hashososhoro]] || [[word:hashosokoro|hashosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
